_doc: Event flags considered SET in our open world (EarthBound post-intro,
morning-after state). Single source of truth shared by the engine
(filters flag-conditional NPC placements). Must stay consistent with
0x68  - meteor-night road/police state cleared (pairs with tile change 0x8068)
0x154 - intro night curfew over; kills the 35 'go home' teleport strips in Onett
0x177 - Onett daytime crowd out on the streets
0x1d5 - morning after the meteor: cops/sawhorses/cop car/onlookers gone
0x1a6 - morning: night window/curtain props (sprites 373-375) removed from
houses; daytime sawhorses (sprite 203) appear at the crash-site path
0x278 - town house doors unlocked (20 doors, incl. the hilltop houses)
Deliberately NOT set: 0x1d3/0x1da (intro bedroom-window warp pair),
